array.string: set -euo pipefail DOCSPELL_PASSWORD=$(security find-generic-password -s docspell -a library/dmedarov -w) export DOCSPELL_PASSWORD target="$HOME/Backups/docspell/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" mkdir -p "$target" echo "[$(date)] starting weekly backup to $target" /opt/homebrew/bin/dsc -d https://docspell.medarov.net \ login -u library/dmedarov -p "$DOCSPELL_PASSWORD" /opt/homebrew/bin/dsc -d https://docspell.medarov.net \ export --target "$target" --all # Retention: keep the most recent 12 dated dirs cd "$HOME/Backups/docspell" ls -1d 20*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -r | tail -n +13 | xargs -r rm -rf echo "[$(date)] backup finished — kept $(ls -1d 20*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) snapshots"
